---
title: "Lake Chad Maps"
output: html_document
---

### Lake Chad Maps

```{r}

base_dir <- "/Users/miaparker/Desktop/LandCover" 

```

```{r}
library(terra)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyterra)
library(dplyr)
library(ggspatial)
library(purrr)
library(scales)

# MODIS Sinusoidal CRS
crs_sinu <- "+proj=sinu +lon_0=0 +x_0=0 +y_0=0 +R=6371007.181 +units=m +no_defs"

# Change Unit of Coordinates
lake_chad_wgs84 <- as.polygons(ext(13.0, 15.5, 12.5, 14.5), crs = "EPSG:4326")
lake_chad_sinu  <- project(lake_chad_wgs84, crs_sinu)
lake_chad_ext   <- ext(lake_chad_sinu)

# 1. Load & Sort Files
lc_files <- list.files(base_dir, pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)
years    <- as.numeric(regmatches(basename(lc_files),
                                  regexpr("[0-9]{4}", basename(lc_files))))
file_df  <- data.frame(File = lc_files, Year = years) %>% arrange(Year)

start_year <- file_df$Year[1]
end_year   <- file_df$Year[nrow(file_df)]

# 2. Helper Function 
load_lake_water <- function(filepath) {
  r      <- rast(filepath)
  crs(r) <- crs_sinu
  r_crop <- crop(r, lake_chad_ext)
  water  <- ifel(r_crop == 17, 1, NA)
  as.factor(water)
}

# ── 3. Map Plot Function ──────────────────────────────────────
plot_lake_map <- function(water_raster, year, fill_color = "#4a90c4") {
  ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = water_raster) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values      = c("1" = fill_color),
      labels      = c("1" = "Water"),
      name        = NULL,
      na.translate = FALSE
    ) +
    coord_sf(crs = crs_sinu) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    annotation_scale(location = "bl", width_hint = 0.25) +
    annotation_north_arrow(
      location    = "tr",
      which_north = "true",
      style       = north_arrow_fancy_orienteering()
    ) +
    labs(
      title    = paste0("Figure 3 - Lake Chad: ", year),
      x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude",
      caption = "Source: NASA MODIS/Terra+Aqua Land Cover Type Yearly L3 Global 500m SIN Grid V061 (NASA, n.d.)."
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40"),
      legend.position = "bottom"
      )
}

# 4. Generate Maps
r_early <- load_lake_water(file_df$File[1])
r_late  <- load_lake_water(file_df$File[nrow(file_df)])

map_early <- plot_lake_map(r_early, start_year, fill_color = "#4a90c4")
map_late  <- plot_lake_map(r_late,  end_year,   fill_color = "#4a90c4")

print(map_early)
print(map_late)

# 5. Area Time Series
pixel_area_km2 <- (463.3127 * 463.3127) / 1e6  # true pixel area from your res()

lake_area_data <- map2_dfr(file_df$File, file_df$Year, function(f, yr) {
  r      <- rast(f)
  crs(r) <- crs_sinu
  r_crop <- crop(r, lake_chad_ext)
  water  <- ifel(r_crop == 17, 1, NA)
  n_pix  <- global(water, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)$sum
  data.frame(Year = yr, Water_Pixels = n_pix, Area_km2 = n_pix * pixel_area_km2)
})

print(lake_area_data)

# 6. Area Plot
area_plot <- ggplot(lake_area_data, aes(x = Year, y = Area_km2)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = min(Area_km2) * 0.95, ymax = Area_km2),
    fill = "#4a90c4", alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_line(color  = "#4a90c4", linewidth = 1.3) +
  geom_point(color = "#1a5e8a", size = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = lake_area_data$Year) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title    = paste0("Figure 2 - Lake Chad Surface Area: ", start_year, "–", end_year),
    x = "Year",
    y = expression("Surface Area ("~km^2~")"),
    caption = "Source: NASA MODIS/Terra+Aqua Land Cover Type Yearly L3 Global 500m SIN Grid V061 (NASA, n.d.)."
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(area_plot)

```
